mission.title: gitea: Hide users from public view
mission.description: Hide users from public view. Requested by 46+ users.

steps.title: Check current gitea setup
steps.description:
Verify your gitea version and configuration:
```bash
gitea --version
```
This feature requires a working gitea installation.

steps.title: Review gitea configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant gitea configuration:
- Gitea version (or commit ref): 1.2.3
- Git version: 2.15
- Operating system: CentOS
- Database (use `[x]`):
- Can you reproduce the bug at https://try.gitea.io:
- Log gist:

## Description
I think there should exist a config option to

steps.title: Apply the fix for Hide users from public view
steps.description:
Yeah, this would be nice to have. For now, I've just had to 403 anyone who visits ```/explore/users``` via NGINX. FWIW, looks like both the gitea and gogs community wants this. https://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/5080 https://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/3248 ```yaml {{template "base/head" .}}
{{template "explore/navbar" .}}
Users not viewable.
{{template "base/footer" .}} ```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Hide users from public view" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Yeah, this would be nice to have. For now, I've just had to 403 anyone who visits ```/explore/users``` via NGINX.

FWIW, looks like both the gitea and gogs community wants this.

https://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/5080
https://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/3248

prerequisites.description: A working gitea installation or development environment.
